ICS 27.010
F 01                                                            ee
一
4
National Standard of the People”s Republic of China
GB 30255一2019
Replace GB 30255一2013
Minimum allowable values of energy
efficiency and energy efficiency grades of
LED products for indoor lighting
室内照明用LED 产品能效
限定值及能效等级
(CEnglish Translation )
Issue date:2019-04-04                           Implementation date:2020-05-01
lssued by _ State Administration for Market Regulation
Standardization Administration of the People"s Republic of China
